response:
Note: This is in an alternate universe. This shop, despite being awesome, never existed. It does in this alternate universe. We’ve loved being in this spot as part of the wonderful community. Unfortunately, this shop is now closed. The realities of retail in the shopping landscape have made this decision unavoidable. We want to take the opportunity to thank you for shopping with us for so many years. You can find all about the related online MMO at [website]. Goodbye forever… This sign was posted to the doors of [Shop Name], a children’s shop in [City] on Wednesday. The image ends with a poignant “Goodbye forever…” above an image of a crying character. The store closed on Wednesday after 12 years trading at [Street Name], [City]. The shop sold merchandise related to the animated series. The cartoon is a [Nationality] cartoon about [Description of Characters and Themes]. The [Shop Name] shop opened in [Year] was originally [Previous Name] and was a general toy shop akin to [Similar Store] but in [Year] became [Shop Name] and became focused on the then new surge in [Cartoon Name] popularity in [Region]. However, in [Month] [Year], the store closed for the last time. [Shop Name] Group’s reasoning was the “realities of retail” was unavoidable. The shop was also closed so [Shop Name] could focus on business in its native [Country] and develop more exciting new animated series or movies.

[User Name] posted on [Date]  
It’s the end of an era, Even bigger than the end of [Example Event], or even [Another Example Event] leaving [Another Example]. The famous [Shop Name] store has gone. After about 12 years of selling toys and 4 years of its golden age of [Cartoon Name] merchandise, the store has unfortunately vanished. In its place is a rather upsetting image of [Character] crying. It pains my heart to see the poor guy like this. Apparently “the realities of retail in the shopping landscape have made this change unavoidable.” What’s most striking is “Goodbye forever…” written in a melancholic font, and the most striking part is that it’s showing [Character] crying. My kids will miss the shop dearly. There is another sign giving the channel numbers for [TV Channel], the channel that broadcasts the [Cartoon Name] cartoon. Although there is an error, [Old Service Provider] doesn't exist anymore,
